Afghanistan Discovery Tour Spring

From $1,890 9 Days Group: Private or 2–8 travelers Apr-Jun Activity: Moderate
Overview

About This Tour

The Discovery Tour is a balanced overview of Afghanistan’s highlights, combining major cities, cultural landmarks, and natural scenery.

Regions: West, Central
Provinces: Kabul, Bamyan, Parwan, Wardak, Herat
Travel Style: Cultural / Scenic
Day by Day

Tour Itinerary

  1. 1
    Day 1 Kabul

    Arrival & Orientation

    “Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and a relaxed orientation Sightseeing depending on arrival time.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Shah-e-Du Shamshira Mosque

    Spiritual & Religious

    Babur's Gardens

    Landmarks

    Kahfroshi Bird Market

    Bazaars & Artisans

    Murad Khane

    Bazaars & Artisans

  2. 2
    Day 2 Kabul

    Drive Kabul–Panjshir

    “Drive from Kabul to Panjshir via Parwan. Sightseeing on the way in and out of the valley with optional hike in the valley.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

    Stops on this day

    Ghazi Olympic Stadium

    Urban

    Ahmad Shah Massoud Mausoleum

    Landmarks

    Paryan Valley

    Nature & Adventure

    Jabal Saraj Palace

    Landmarks

  3. 3
    Day 3 Bamyan

    Drive Kabul–Bamyan

    “Drive from Kabul to Bamyan via Parwan or Wardak depending on road conditions. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Bamyan.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

    Stops on this day

    Shahr-e-Zohak

    Ancient Civilizations

    Shahr-e-Gholghola

    Ancient Civilizations

    Buddha Niches of Bamyan

    Ancient Civilizations

  4. 4
    Day 4 Bamyan

    Band-e-Amir National Park

    “Depart early morning for a day trip to see Band-e-Amir National Park.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

    Stops on this day

    Band-e-Amir National Park

    Nature & Adventure

  5. 5
    Day 5 Ghazni

    Drive Bamyan-Ghazni

    “Drive from Bamyan to Ghazni via Wardak. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Ghazni.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

    Stops on this day

    Wardak Highlands

    Rural

    Bala Hisar of Ghazni

    Landmarks

  6. 6
    Day 6 Ghazni

    Ghazni Sightseeing

    “A day of sightseeing in Ghazni.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Ghazni Minarets

    Ancient Civilizations

    Tomb of Sultan Mahmud

    Spiritual & Religious

    Tapa Sardar

    Ancient Civilizations

    Palace of Sultan Mas'ud III

    Ancient Civilizations

  7. 7
    Day 7 Kabul

    Drive Ghazni-Kabul

    “Drive from Ghazni. Sightseeing in Kabul, depending on travel times.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

    Stops on this day

    Kahfroshi Bird Market

    Bazaars & Artisans

    TV Tower Hill (Mount Asmai)

    Urban

    Sakhi Shrine

    Spiritual & Religious

    Chicken Street

    Bazaars & Artisans

  8. 8
    Day 8 Kabul

    Sightseeing Kabul

    “A day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Darulaman Palace

    Landmarks

    Kabul National Museum

    Landmarks

    Babur's Gardens

    Landmarks

    Wazir Akbar Khan Hill

    Urban

  9. 9
    Day 9 Kabul

    Airport Transfer - Depart from Kabul

    “Hotel check-out and Airport Drop-off, departing flights from Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

What's Included

Tour Inclusions

  • Arrival & Orientation

    “Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and a relaxed orientation Sightseeing depending on arrival time.”

  • Drive Kabul–Panjshir

    “Drive from Kabul to Panjshir via Parwan. Sightseeing on the way in and out of the valley with optional hike in the valley.”

  • Drive Kabul–Bamyan

    “Drive from Kabul to Bamyan via Parwan or Wardak depending on road conditions. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Bamyan.”

  • Band-e-Amir National Park

    “Depart early morning for a day trip to see Band-e-Amir National Park.”

  • Drive Bamyan-Ghazni

    “Drive from Bamyan to Ghazni via Wardak. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Ghazni.”

  • Ghazni Sightseeing

    “A day of sightseeing in Ghazni.”

  • Drive Ghazni-Kabul

    “Drive from Ghazni. Sightseeing in Kabul, depending on travel times.”

  • Sightseeing Kabul

    “A day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

  • Airport Transfer - Depart from Kabul

    “Hotel check-out and Airport Drop-off, departing flights from Kabul.”

Highlights

Featured Attractions

Spiritual & Religious

Shah-e-Du Shamshira Mosque

The unique 'Mosque of Two Swords'.

Kabul

Landmarks

Babur's Gardens

Terraced Mughal paradise in Kabul.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Kahfroshi Bird Market

A sensory journey through the bird bazaar.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Murad Khane

Beautifully restored timber-framed old city.

Kabul

From $1,890

Best available local hotels, clean and well-located.

Private vehicle with professional driver and local guide.
